title: Incorporating Engine Size as a Feature in a Predictive Model
description: A flowchart showing how the 'Engine Size (L)' feature is processed and utilized within a statistical machine learning pipeline for automotive data science.
elements: Model Prediction/Output (e.g., CO2 Emissions, Fuel Economy, Price)
relationships: Raw data is cleaned and prepared, extracting the 'Engine Size' feature
The 'Engine Size' feature is fed as an input (predictor variable) into the model
The model uses this and other features to learn patterns and make a prediction
